2026-04-07T07:51:22.5534517Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5534784Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5534933Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5535141Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5535524Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5535642Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5535785Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-07T07:51:22.5535865Z [36;1melse[0m
